# FileBreadcrumb

Path-aware breadcrumb navigation built on top of Breadcrumb primitives

## FileBreadcrumb[‚Äã](#filebreadcrumb-1 "Direct link to FileBreadcrumb")

Path-aware breadcrumb navigation built on top of Breadcrumb primitives

**Source:** [`packages/appkit-ui/src/react/file-browser/file-breadcrumb.tsx`](https://github.com/databricks/appkit/blob/main/packages/appkit-ui/src/react/file-browser/file-breadcrumb.tsx)

### Props[‚Äã](#props "Direct link to Props")

| Prop                  | Type                      | Required | Default | Description                                                          |
| --------------------- | ------------------------- | -------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `rootLabel`           | `string`                  | ‚úì        | -       | Label for the root breadcrumb item                                   |
| `segments`            | `string[]`                | ‚úì        | -       | Path segments after the root                                         |
| `onNavigateToRoot`    | `() => void`              | ‚úì        | -       | Called when the root breadcrumb is clicked                           |
| `onNavigateToSegment` | `(index: number) => void` | ‚úì        | -       | Called when a segment breadcrumb is clicked (receives segment index) |

### Usage[‚Äã](#usage "Direct link to Usage")

```tsx
import { FileBreadcrumb } from '@databricks/appkit-ui';

<FileBreadcrumb /* props */ />

```
